title: ライスのヴァンパイア退治大作戦！

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... Where am I? Why am I here?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Is anyone here? Big Brother... Anyone?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Is anyone here? Big Sister... Anyone?
I've found you, Sable Assassin.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Gyah! Wh-who are you?!

text_block_list.name: Vampire
text_block_list.text:
Mwahaha, I have come to visit you. I am the King
of Darkness—a vampire.

text_block_list.name: Vampire
text_block_list.text:
Now, come with me. I shall make a feast of your
blood!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Gyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...And then I woke up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower seems low on energy during training.
I ask her about it and she tells me about a
nightmare she had.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry. I know how important getting enough
sleep is!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: This is all my fault!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm the one who recommended that vampire
book...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
No, it's not your fault, Rob Roy! I was the one
who asked... I was just a bit curious with
Halloween coming up...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It was scary, but a dream is just a dream. All you
have to do is wake up... I'm fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, sleep deprivation won't do any good for her
training. We can't let this continue...
choice_data_list: Should we get you a protective charm?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, sleep deprivation won't do any good for her
training. We can't let this continue...
choice_data_list: Should we get you a protective charm?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A protective charm?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower looks confused, so I show her a pair
of replacement cleats I brought with me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Is there something special about those cleats?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I see! They say cleats can function as a protective
talisman!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I've read that the fairies who bring nightmares
hate iron... We should hang those up in our dorm
room immediately!
choice_data_list: Do you need more? I can get them if you do.
Do you need more? I can get them if you do.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: More?! Where would we even put them?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'll help as well. Should we hang one at the
entrance to the dorm too?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
In that vein, I've heard that sage can also prevent
bad dreams. Do you want to go pick some with
me?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Rob Roy... Big Brother...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Rob Roy... Big Sister...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. As long as I have you two, I'm sure
everything will work out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower's smile has returned. The next
morning, she announces that she slept well.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that no matter how powerful they might
be, a vampire is probably no match for an
Umamusume who trains hard.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: R-really? If you say so, I guess it must be true...
choice_data_list: All right. I'll play the vampire, then.
All right. I'll play the vampire, then.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: R-really? If you say so, I guess it must be true...
choice_data_list: All right. I'll play the vampire, then.
All right. I'll play the vampire, then.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eeeek!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower dashes away in the blink of an eye.
She may be screaming, but I can't help but notice
how strong her start is!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Just like that, Rice! If you can picture this while
you're dreaming, I'm sure that nightmare won't
bother you any longer!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Really? Okay, I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, our vampire eradication training
continues...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Great work! How are you feeling, Rice?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... I don't think I'm as scared anymore!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah... but I've realized something.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
If the vampire is actually someone like you, I
don't want to defeat it... I'd rather be friends.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
If the vampire is actually someone like you, I
don't want to defeat it... I'd rather be friends.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So... ummm... the next time they show up in my
dream, I'll do my best to befriend them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rice Shower is too kind for her own good.
